title: Viber API tokens should not be disclosed
description: Viber is a messaging platform with over 1 billion users. Viber bot authentication tokens are used to send messages, manage chatbots, and access account information. Exposing these tokens enables unauthorized messaging and potential phishing campaigns.
recommendation: Remove Viber authentication tokens from source code. Store in environment variables. Revoke and regenerate immediately at partners.viber.com.
impact: Unauthorized messaging to Viber users, potential phishing campaigns, and brand impersonation.

checks.message: Viber bot authentication token detected in variable assignment. Viber authentication tokens allow sending messages to all users who have subscribed to your bot, broadcasting messages, accessing subscriber information, and managing bot configuration. Exposing this token enables sending phishing messages or spam to your entire subscriber base from your verified bot identity. Revoke immediately at partners.viber.com and notify affected users if misused.
